topics.title: Hardy Lang's Beer League Premiere
topics.summary: The studio discusses the success of Hardy Lang's film, the quality of the cast, and humorous anecdotes from the premiere night.

topics.title: Artie's Film Premiere and Red Carpet Experiences
topics.summary: The studio discusses the success of Artie's new movie, the experiences of attending its premiere, and the humorous interactions with reporters on the red carpet.

topics.title: Comedy Film Review and Football Picks
topics.summary: The studio discusses a recent comedy film, upcoming guest appearances from Norm Macdonald, and proceeds to take heated phone calls regarding football betting picks.

topics.title: Sports Betting and DVD Promotion
topics.summary: The studio features callers and guests as they place bets on upcoming football games while one guest promotes his adult-themed DVD.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Expansion and Media Criticism
topics.summary: The studio addresses reports regarding the success of satellite radio, refutes claims that Howard Stern's influence is declining, and criticizes media outlets for spreading inaccurate information about his transition from terrestrial radio.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Growth and Industry Competition
topics.summary: The studio discusses the rapid growth of satellite radio, the perceived threat to traditional terrestrial radio's market value, and the host's success in transitioning his audience to a paid subscription model.

topics.title: Radio Industry and Satellite Competition
topics.summary: The studio discusses the limitations of HD radio, the success of satellite radio platforms, and the ongoing competitive landscape between terrestrial and satellite broadcasting.

topics.title: Prank Calls and Movie Promotion
topics.summary: The show features a series of prank phone calls to a restaurant, discussions regarding the promotion of a new film, and an upcoming competition for audience members.

topics.title: Sexual Performance Competition
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition where two women perform on a vibrator and sing for a cash prize.

topics.title: The Hodeo Competition
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition where contestants are judged on their performances and physical attributes while using a vibrator.

topics.title: Bucking Benji Rodeo Competition
topics.summary: The studio hosts a rodeo-themed competition where three contestants compete for a $5,000 prize by riding a man dressed as a bucking horse.

topics.title: Miss Rodeo 2006 Contest Results
topics.summary: The studio presents a check to the winner of the rodeo competition and discusses the sponsorship from Hotmovies.com.

topics.title: Media Commentary and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including a dispute over a comedy bit's origin, the lack of traffic in New York City on 9/11, an investigation into a suspicious death in the Bahamas involving Anna Nicole Smith, and various celebrity media appearances.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Growth and Industry Rivalries
topics.summary: The studio discusses the rapid growth of satellite radio compared to terrestrial HD radio, while also reviewing celebrity gossip stories involving Lindsay Lohan and Taylor Hicks.

topics.title: Tom Cruise Generosity and Movie Reviews
topics.summary: The show discusses a story about Tom Cruise giving money to a limo driver, evaluates the authenticity of various celebrity rumors, reviews Artie Lange's film "Beer League," and addresses reports linking a Montreal shooting to a website mentioned by Artie Lange.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Campus Shooting
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news including Whitney Houston's divorce, various television appearances, and details regarding a shooting at Dawson College.

topics.title: Media Scandals and Legal Issues
topics.summary: The studio reviews various media controversies, including a teacher's past, a missing child case involving Nancy Grace, Laura Silberstein’s controversial remarks, and the legal fallout of Joe Francis's adult films.

topics.title: Current Events and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The studio covers topics including a car fire involving Hulk Hogan's son, the kidnapping of an elderly woman, international relations regarding Iraq and Iran, upcoming elections, and various celebrity news and comedy updates.
